target: 5. Memories of Kofune

I'm back!
Sorry I'm late!

I'm back!
I'm back again!
Welcome back, you guys must be hungry, right? Lunch is ready.
That's right! Let's put the time capsule search on hold for now and get some food in us first.
Yeah. I'm back, Alain.
Welcome back, Shinpei. Seems like you're up to something big again.
Yeah, actually, we are.
Dad, add one more portion! For our guest.
Come on, Kaori-chan! Come closer.
H-Hello. I apologize for intruding while you're busy.
Ah, welcome. Ushio, is this a friend from high school?
No, no. She was a classmate of ours in elementary school, Kaori Koyuba-chan.
She moved off the island when we were in the upper grades, but she came back in time for the festival.
Ah, so you're the Koyuba family's girl! You've gotten so pretty. Are your parents doing well?
Yes, thankfully.
Well, that's good to hear.
Kaori-chan is working as an idol in Tokyo now, and she's super popular.
So, the town hall and Chamber of Commerce invited her as the main guest for the festival, saying they wanted to use her popularity to draw a crowd.
Ooh, is that so. Then we'll have to make sure you get some nutrition in you. Is the same lunch as everyone else okay?
A-About the money--
No need to hold back. It's a thank you for being good friends with my kids.
Don't worry about that, just sit down. Is next to Shinpei okay?
Go ahead, Koyuba-san.
Y-Yes. I'll take you up on your kind offer. Thank you all so much.
Well then...
Thanks for the food!
How is it, Kaori-chan? My dad's fried food is superb.
…Mmm, delicious!
Right!?
This taste... I remember it. I've eaten this before!
Yeah, you and your family used to come eat here sometimes.
Yes, I believe so. I was still small, so my memory is a bit hazy, but...
Hehe, it's so nostalgic.
We've already found one memory!

Yes!
Thank you, Kofune-san.
Man~~~, it's hot, it's hot!!
Welcome, Tetsu-san.
Ooh! What's this, everyone having a nice lunch together?
Did you come to eat lunch too, Totsumura-san?
Yeah, and as part of my patrol.
The number of tourists is increasing ahead of the festival, so I'm just giving a little warning... to--
Uwoooooooh!! K-Kaori Koyuba-chan!?
Y-You're kidding, right!? Why are you in a place like this...!
Hello~! I'm Kaori Koyuba!
Tetsu-san, do you know Kaori-chan?
I'm a fan, so of course I do! I heard she was coming for the festival, so I was really looking forward to it!
Thank you so much!
Kaori-chan, you're like a completely different person.
Don't say that. It's what you call an adult's professional smile.
U-Umm! Could I ask for your autograph!?
Totsumura-san! Kaori-chan is having her lunch now, so leave it for later!
Well, I guess it can't be helped... Then, maybe after Kaori-chan finishes eating--
No, it's fine! I'll sign it right away, so please wait just a moment.
R-Really!? Is it really okay!?
Yes, of course.
I'm so moved! I'll make it a family heirloom!
(Koyuba-san is so kind... She didn't even show a hint of annoyance.)
